title: Payment models
excerpt: Are there payment models that can be made for customers and are they free or paid plans?

posts.author: saidhajj (Saiadhajj)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there payment models that can be made for customers and are they free or paid plans?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

You can find our plan pricing here → monday.com pricing and plans

We also have a free plan available and you can find more information here → https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010487220-Understanding-the-Free-Plan

As for payment models, would you be happy to elaborate on this for us?
